results.final_skill_tail:
recognition questions with explicit parameter ranges or PDE blow-up/concentration statements, copy the exact inequalities, coefficients, signs, normalizations, and quantifiers into the hidden check, then reject any option that changes one of them; in particular, strict endpoints such as 2/15+ε<θ<1−δ0 and equation signs such as −Δv_n=... must be matched exactly.
